name: Harmonie
description: Generate Jellyfin playlists from harmonie audio similarity. Name a playlist [HRMN] and the plugin fills it with tracks similar to whatever you put in. Drift and energy modes are available via title parameters.
overview: Build playlists from harmonie audio similarity.
